   "reasoning": "I'm sick of empty promises and policies that don't put food on the table. Student scholarships are the only thing that's going to keep me and others like me from dropping out, so that should be the top priority. Funding boosts and hiring more staff might help, but only if it translates to real support for working students like me, not just more paperwork and bureaucracy.",
